content: (The location is now Kolbjorn Barrow.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Selena, Restless Draugr, Serana, Frea, Lydia)

Candance: This Kolbjorn Barrow feels like it's swallowing us whole in the pre-dawn chill—Selena's just ahead, but I hear those restless draugr stirring in the shadows. Norma: Aye, the cold bites deeper here on Solstheim than in Skyrim's heartlands.

(*You are observing the following:* The scene depicts a dimly lit, circular chamber carved from rough, weathered stone, with high arched walls curving inward to form a domed ceiling. Flickering torchlight from iron brackets mounted on the walls casts long shadows, illuminating intricate carvings of stern faces and abstract motifs etched into the stone blocks. The floor is uneven, strewn with debris, and centers on a raised circular platform accessed by short, blood-smeared steps. This platform is surrounded by dark pools of blood that have spread outward, soaking into the cracks of the stone. In the foreground and around the platform lie several lifeless human figures, clad in tattered robes, fur-trimmed garments, and simple tunics, their bodies sprawled in unnatural poses amid the gore. One figure near the steps wears dark, flowing robes with intricate embroidery, another in lighter attire with a hood partially fallen back. Weapons like swords and staffs are scattered nearby, some bloodied. The air seems heavy with the aftermath of violence, with no signs of movement or life beyond the subtle glow of the torches.)

(Candance is now in combat!) (Serana is now in combat!) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Frea, Serana, Lydia, Restless Draugr, Hulking Draugr)

Candance: These draugr won't stay down—keep your guard up, Norma, they're swarming from the shadows! Norma: Aye, the cold's nothing compared to these cursed bones rising again. I'll crush that hulking brute before it reaches us!
Candance: These shadows from the torchlight make every corner a trap—watch for more draugr stirring in those crevices!
